# InternetOstrava.cz

> InternetOstrava.cz helps residents of Ostrava and the surrounding region verify the availability of internet service for an exact address. The homepage and conversion pages are provider-neutral; the dedicated PODA pages explain availability checks for the PODA network and are operated by a sales representative of PODA a.s., not by PODA a.s. itself.

## Main pages

- [Internet Ostrava](https://internetostrava.cz/): provider-neutral overview, indicative tariffs, address verification, and frequently asked questions
- [PODA internet Ostrava](https://internetostrava.cz/poda-internet-ostrava/): focused explanation of how PODA internet availability is verified by exact address in Ostrava
- [PODA dostupnost](https://internetostrava.cz/poda-dostupnost/): explanation of how PODA coverage and availability are verified per exact address
- [PODA internet Karviná](https://internetostrava.cz/poda-karvina/): availability verification for addresses in Karviná and surroundings
- [Availability verification](https://internetostrava.cz/dostupnost/): non-binding form for checking an Ostrava address
- [Tariffs](https://internetostrava.cz/tarify/): indicative options subject to address verification
- [Contact](https://internetostrava.cz/kontakt/): representative contact details
- [Ostrava-Poruba](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-ostrava-poruba/): local page for checking PODA internet options in Poruba
- [Ostrava-Jih](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-ostrava-jih/): local page for Hrabuvka, Zabreh, Dubina, Vyskovice, and nearby addresses
- [Marianské Hory](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-marianske-hory/): local page for Marianské Hory and wider central Ostrava
- [Moravska Ostrava](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-moravska-ostrava/): local page for central Ostrava addresses
- [Vitkovice](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-ostrava-vitkovice/): local page for checking internet options in Vitkovice
- [Slezska Ostrava](https://internetostrava.cz/internet-slezska-ostrava/): local page for checking internet options in Slezska Ostrava

## Canonical query aliases

Short query-style paths such as `/poda-ostrava`, `/poda-poruba`, `/internet-poruba`, `/internet-hrabuvka`, and `/internet-zabreh` redirect to the closest canonical landing page instead of creating duplicate thin pages.
